seo.title: HeartLink | Private Matchmaking
seo.description: Private matchmaking for select Gujarati and Marwari families in India and across the world.

hero.title: Trusted matchmaking for select Indian families.
hero.description: HeartLink helps Gujarati and Marwari families find suitable life partners through a private, carefully checked and family-focused process.
hero.note: No public profiles · No app culture · Strict privacy
hero.privacyNote: Identity is shared only with approval.

registry.title: We work with a limited number of families at a time.
registry.description: This allows HeartLink to give personal attention to each serious case. Important introductions are reviewed by Gopi Shah.

advantage.title: Private, selective and family-focused.
advantage.description: Most platforms show many profiles. HeartLink focuses on fewer, better introductions.

dimensions.title: Background. Compatibility. Family comfort.
dimensions.description: A good match should feel right for the individual and the family.

cards.label: 01 · Search
cards.title: Fewer, better introductions.
cards.description: Profiles are selected with background, values and long-term fit in mind.

cards.label: 02 · Guidance
cards.title: Support during the process.
cards.description: We help both sides understand expectations and move with clarity.

cards.label: 03 · Family
cards.title: Two families, handled carefully.
cards.description: When needed, we support family conversations before and after commitment.
